member.name: M:SafeRoad.WebApi.Controllers.AdminController.GetAllUsers(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get all users with pagination and filtering (Admin only)

member.name: M:SafeRoad.WebApi.Controllers.AdminController.GetAllIncidents(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get all incidents for admin management (Admin only)

member.name: M:SafeRoad.WebApi.Controllers.AnalyticsController.GetTrends(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get incident trend data over the last N days

member.name: M:SafeRoad.WebApi.Controllers.AuthController.Register(SafeRoad.Core.Features.Auth.Commands.Register.RegisterCommand)
member.returns: User info and JWT access token
member.response: Email already exists or validation error

member.name: M:SafeRoad.WebApi.Controllers.AuthController.Login(SafeRoad.Core.Features.Auth.Commands.Login.LoginCommand)
member.returns: User info and JWT access token

member.name: M:SafeRoad.WebApi.Controllers.AuthController.Logout
member.summary: Logout — removes device tokens and invalidates session
member.remarks: Client must discard the JWT token after calling this endpoint. Since JWT is stateless, the token remains technically valid until expiration, but device tokens are removed to stop push notifications.

member.name: T:SafeRoad.WebApi.Controllers.CommentController
member.summary: Comment management — add, list, and delete comments on incidents

member.name: M:SafeRoad.WebApi.Controllers.CommentController.Create(System.Guid,SafeRoad.Core.DTOs.Comment.CreateCommentRequest)
member.summary: Add a comment to an incident

member.name: M:SafeRoad.WebApi.Controllers.CommentController.GetByIncident(System.Guid,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get all comments for an incident (paginated)

member.name: M:SafeRoad.WebApi.Controllers.HealthController.Get
member.summary: Check if the API is running

member.name: T:SafeRoad.WebApi.Controllers.IncidentCategoryController
member.summary: Incident categories — list all available incident types

member.name: T:SafeRoad.WebApi.Controllers.IncidentController
member.summary: Incident management — create, query, update, and delete traffic incidents

member.name: M:SafeRoad.WebApi.Controllers.IncidentController.GetNearby(System.Double,System.Double,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get nearby incidents based on location

member.name: M:SafeRoad.WebApi.Controllers.IncidentController.GetMy(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get incidents reported by the authenticated user

member.name: T:SafeRoad.WebApi.Controllers.UserController
member.summary: User profile management — view, update profile, change password, and statistics

member.name: M:SafeRoad.WebApi.Controllers.UserController.GetMyStats
member.summary: Get your personal statistics (total incidents, comments, verifications, trust score)

member.name: T:SafeRoad.WebApi.Controllers.UserJourneyController
member.summary: User journeys — start a trip with route calculation and incident warnings, end trip with report prompt

member.name: M:SafeRoad.WebApi.Controllers.UserJourneyController.Start(SafeRoad.Core.DTOs.UserJourney.StartJourneyRequest)
member.summary: Start a new journey — calculates route and returns incidents along the way

member.name: M:SafeRoad.WebApi.Controllers.UserJourneyController.End
member.summary: End the active journey — asks user if they saw any incidents

member.name: T:SafeRoad.WebApi.Controllers.VerificationController
member.summary: Incident verification — verify, dispute, and manage votes

member.name: M:SafeRoad.WebApi.Controllers.VerificationController.RemoveVote(System.Guid)
member.summary: Remove your vote from an incident

member.name: M:SafeRoad.WebApi.Controllers.VerificationController.GetVerifications(System.Guid)
member.summary: Get all verifications for an incident

member.name: T:SafeRoad.WebApi.Controllers.WatchedAreaController
member.summary: Watched areas — manage regions you want to monitor for new incidents

member.name: M:SafeRoad.WebApi.Controllers.WatchedAreaController.Create(SafeRoad.Core.DTOs.WatchedArea.CreateWatchedAreaRequest)
member.summary: Add a new watched area (name, center point, radius)

member.name: T:SafeRoad.WebApi.Swagger.EnumSchemaFilter
member.summary: Appends human-readable enum member names to every enum schema so Swagger UI shows "0 = Pending, 1 = Verified, …" instead of bare integers.

member.name: T:SafeRoad.WebApi.Swagger.SwaggerExampleSchemaFilter
member.summary: Populates the "Example Value" section in Swagger UI with realistic, pre-filled JSON for every request and response schema.
